DockerBuildRequest.doc: The parameters for a docker quick build.

properties.name: imageNames
properties.doc: The fully qualified image names including the repository and tag.

properties.name: isPushEnabled
properties.doc: The value of this property indicates whether the image built should be pushed to the registry or not.

properties.name: IsCacheDisabled
properties.doc: The value of this property indicates whether the image cache is enabled or not.

properties.name: dockerFilePath
properties.doc: The Docker file path relative to the source location.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The name of the target build stage for the docker build.

properties.name: arguments
properties.doc: The collection of override arguments to be used when executing the run.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the argument.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The value of the argument.

properties.name: isSecret
properties.doc: Flag to indicate whether the argument represents a secret and want to be removed from build logs.

properties.name: TimeoutInSeconds
properties.doc: Run timeout in seconds.

properties.name: platform
properties.doc: The platform properties against which the run has to happen.

properties.name: agentConfiguration
properties.doc: The machine configuration of the run agent.

properties.name: sourceLocation
properties.doc:
The URL(absolute or relative) of the source context. It can be an URL to a tar or git repository.
If it is relative URL, the relative path should be obtained from calling listBuildSourceUploadUrl API.

properties.name: credentials
properties.doc: The properties that describes a set of credentials that will be used when this run is invoked.

type.name: ContainerRegistryTaskCredentials
type.doc: The parameters that describes a set of credentials that will be used when a run is invoked.

properties.name: sourceRegistry
properties.doc: Describes the credential parameters for accessing the source registry.

type.name: SourceRegistryCredentials
type.doc: Describes the credential parameters for accessing the source registry.

properties.name: identity
properties.doc:
The Entra identity used for source registry login.
The value is `[system]` for system-assigned managed identity, `[caller]` for caller identity,
and client ID for user-assigned managed identity.

properties.name: loginMode
properties.doc:
The authentication mode which determines the source registry login scope. The credentials for the source registry
will be generated using the given scope. These credentials will be used to login to
the source registry during the run.

properties.name: customRegistries
properties.doc:
Describes the credential parameters for accessing other custom registries. The key
for the dictionary item will be the registry login server (myregistry.azurecr.io) and
the value of the item will be the registry credentials for accessing the registry.

valueType.name: CustomRegistryCredentials
valueType.doc: Describes the credentials that will be used to access a custom registry during a run.

properties.name: userName
properties.doc: The username for logging into the custom registry.

type.name: ContainerRegistryTaskSecretObject
type.doc: Describes the properties of a secret object value.

properties.name: value
properties.doc:
The value of the secret. The format of this value will be determined
based on the type of the secret object. If the type is Opaque, the value will be
used as is without any modification.

properties.name: type
properties.doc:
The type of the secret object which determines how the value of the secret object has to be
interpreted.

properties.name: password
properties.doc:
The password for logging into the custom registry. The password is a secret
object that allows multiple ways of providing the value for it.

properties.name: identity
properties.doc:
Indicates the managed identity assigned to the custom credential. If a user-assigned identity
this value is the Client ID. If a system-assigned identity, the value will be `system`. In
the case of a system-assigned identity, the Client ID will be determined by the runner. This
identity may be used to authenticate to key vault to retrieve credentials or it may be the only
source of authentication used for accessing the registry.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the run request.

properties.name: imageNames
properties.doc: The fully qualified image names including the repository and tag.

properties.name: isPushEnabled
properties.doc: The value of this property indicates whether the image built should be pushed to the registry or not.

properties.name: IsCacheDisabled
properties.doc: The value of this property indicates whether the image cache is enabled or not.

properties.name: dockerFilePath
properties.doc: The Docker file path relative to the source context.

properties.name: arguments
properties.doc: The collection of override arguments to be used when executing this build step.

properties.name: target
properties.doc: The name of the target build stage for the docker build.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the step.

FileTask.name: FileTaskStepUpdateContent
FileTask.doc: The properties of updating a task step.

properties.name: taskFilePath
properties.doc: The task template/definition file path relative to the source context.

properties.name: valuesFilePath
properties.doc: The values/parameters file path relative to the source context.

properties.name: values
properties.doc: The collection of overridable values that can be passed when running a task.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the step.

EncodedTask.name: EncodedTaskStepUpdateContent
EncodedTask.doc: The properties for updating encoded task step.

properties.name: encodedTaskContent
properties.doc: Base64 encoded value of the template/definition file content.

properties.name: encodedValuesContent
properties.doc: Base64 encoded value of the parameters/values file content.

properties.name: values
properties.doc: The collection of overridable values that can be passed when running a task.

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the step.

properties.name: trigger
properties.doc: The properties for updating trigger properties.

type.name: TriggerUpdateContent
type.doc: The properties for updating triggers.

properties.name: timerTriggers
properties.doc: The collection of timer triggers.

valueType.name: TimerTriggerUpdateContent
valueType.doc: The properties for updating a timer trigger.

properties.name: schedule
properties.doc: The CRON expression for the task schedule

properties.name: status
properties.doc: The current status of trigger.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the trigger.

properties.name: sourceTriggers
properties.doc: The collection of triggers based on source code repository.

valueType.name: SourceTriggerUpdateContent
valueType.doc: The properties for updating a source based trigger.

properties.name: sourceRepository
properties.doc: The properties that describes the source(code) for the task.

type.name: SourceUpdateContent
type.doc: The properties for updating the source code repository.

properties.name: sourceControlType
properties.doc: The type of source control service.

properties.name: repositoryUrl
properties.doc: The full URL to the source code repository

properties.name: branch
properties.doc: The branch name of the source code.

properties.name: sourceControlAuthProperties
properties.doc:
The authorization properties for accessing the source code repository and to set up
webhooks for notifications.

type.name: AuthInfoUpdateContent
type.doc: The authorization properties for accessing the source code repository.

properties.name: tokenType
properties.doc: The type of Auth token.

properties.name: token
properties.doc: The access token used to access the source control provider.

properties.name: refreshToken
properties.doc: The refresh token used to refresh the access token.

properties.name: scope
properties.doc: The scope of the access token.

properties.name: ExpiresInSeconds
properties.doc: Time in seconds that the token remains valid

properties.name: sourceTriggerEvents
properties.doc: The source event corresponding to the trigger.

properties.name: status
properties.doc: The current status of trigger.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the trigger.

properties.name: baseImageTrigger
properties.doc: The trigger based on base image dependencies.

type.name: BaseImageTriggerUpdateContent
type.doc: The properties for updating base image dependency trigger.

properties.name: baseImageTriggerType
properties.doc: The type of the auto trigger for base image dependency updates.

properties.name: updateTriggerEndpoint
properties.doc: The endpoint URL for receiving update triggers.

properties.name: updateTriggerPayloadType
properties.doc: Type of Payload body for Base image update triggers.

properties.name: status
properties.doc: The current status of trigger.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the trigger.

properties.name: credentials
properties.doc: The parameters that describes a set of credentials that will be used when this run is invoked.

properties.name: logTemplate
properties.doc: The template that describes the repository and tag information for run log artifact.

properties.name: tags
properties.doc: The ARM resource tags.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The collection value.

properties.name: nextLink
properties.doc: The URI that can be used to request the next set of paged results.

models.name: SourceUploadResult
models.doc: The properties of a response to source upload request.

properties.name: uploadUrl
properties.doc: The URL where the client can upload the source.

properties.name: relativePath
properties.doc: The relative path to the source. This is used to submit the subsequent queue build request.

clients.name: ContainerRegistryClient
